A clear description of what the bug is.

## Tool affected

Which tool? (e.g. `gl_read_file`, `gl_search_code`)

## Steps to reproduce

1. Call `gl_xxx` with parameters: ...
2. See error: ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (include error messages).
